Function.Inference: Intro section ending with a |: sign.
Loop body marked with Segno and ending with a :| repeat sign.
Continuation of the loop body ending with a D.S. and |] to loop back.

Section.Inference: Brief introduction presenting an initial rhythmic motif.
Main repeated theme A initiated by the Segno.
Introduces a contrasting melodic idea with shifting bass pedals.
Develops the intro motif into a full 8-bar thematic phrase leading to the D.S.
